ety: fr. the trans. tarāshnā
def: v.n. To be pared, &c. (see tarāshnā).
more: v. n. To be pared. See تراشنا v. a.
v. n. To be cut or pared.

ety: inf. n. v of رشح 'to exude sweat,' &c.
def: s.m. Sweating, exuding, exudation; dropping, dripping, distilling; sprinkling, small rain, drizzle; — adj. Manifest, apparent
more: n. m. رشح exuded. 1. What is exuded, dropping (as sweat, etc.) 2. Small rain; drizzling. tarashshoh , adj. Manifest; evident. tarashshoh honā , Ped. for H. phuiyāṅ paṛnā , v. n. 1. To drizzle. 2. To appear; seem.
(inf. v. of رشح) s. m. Exuding, dropping (as, sweat, &c.). 2. Dripping, distilling. 3. A small rain.
subs: v.n. To drizzle ( = phuʼiyāṅ paṛnā); — to be apparent, to appear, seem.

ety: caus. of tarāshnā
def: v.t. To cause to be cut or pared, to have (a thing) cut, &c.
more: v. a. Caus. of tarāshnā q. v.
v. a. To cause to cut or pare.

ety: taras˚ = S. तृष्य(ति), rt. तृष्
def: v.n. To long, be eagerly or anxiously desirous (of), to crave or desire earnestly and repeatedly, to beg (for), entreat, supplicate; to be tantalized.
more: v. n. 1. To long; desire anxiously. Darshan bin aṅkhiyāṅ taras rahīṅ . Song. 2. To stand in need or want of; to lack.
v. n. 1. To long, to desire anxiously, be agog. 2. To pity.
v. n. (dakh.) To beseech, beg, entreat.

ety: inf. n. v of رصد 'to watch or wai' for
def: s.m. Watching or waiting (for), expectation hope.
more: (inf. v. of رصد) s. m. Expectation, hope.

ety: inf. n. v of رسل 'to become easy in pace'
def: s.m. Acting gently, deliberately, or leisurely; being distinct or proceeding slowly (in reading).
more: (inf. v. of رسل) s. Acting gently, being distinct or proceeding slowly (in reading).

def: s.m. Gradation, proportion, the state or condition of more or less; distinction, discrimination.
s. m. Garden-cresses. (Lepidium sativum).
n. m. Garden-cresses; Lepidium sativum . Wat.
s.m. = taṛāyā, q.v. s.m. Gaudiness (in dress), wearing smart clothes, foppishness; vanity, show, ostentation
subs: adj. & s.m. Showy, ostentatious, vain, foppish; — one who wears fine clothes, or is particular as to dress, &c., a fop.

ety: tar, q.v.+āwat = Prk. वत्ता = S. वार्त्ता
def: s.f. Freshness; greenness, verdure; juiciness; moisture, dampness, humidity ( = tarī).
s.f. = tarāwat (the correct form).

ety: for A. طراوة, inf. n. of طرو 'to be fresh, or juicy,' &c.
def: s.f. Freshness, juiciness, succulence; greenness, verdure; moisture, humidity, dampness.
more: n. f. 1. Moisture; humidity. 2. Freshness; verdure. Bāg ko dekh-kar āṅkhoṅ meṅ tarāvaṭ ā gaī .
s. f. Freshness, verdure; moisture, humidity, dampness.

def: s.f. vulg. corr. of the next, q.v.

ety: pl. of tarwīḥat, 'a single rest,' rt. روح
def: s.f. A form of prayer consisting of twenty or more genuflexions (according to different persuasions), performed at some period of the night in the month of Ramaẓān, after the ordinary prayers of nightfall (but, by pious persons, often repeated every morning: they are so called because the performer rests after every four genuflexions).
more: Mah. n. f. Certain extra prayers offered up by the more devout among the Moslems.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَرَاوِیح (tarāwīh), from Arabic تَرَاوِيحْ (tarāwīḥ).

ety: abst. subst. from tarāv, rt. of tarāvīdan
def: s.f. Dripping, sprinkling, sprinkle; trickle; oozing; distillation, exudation
more: s. f. Distillation, dripping, trickling, exudation.
subs: v.n. To fall in drops, to drip, sprinkle, &c.

ety: i.q. taṛākā, q.v.
def: s.m. Gaudiness (in dress), wearing smart clothes, foppishness; vanity, show, ostentation
more: s. m. Gaudiness in dress, wearing smart clothes. تڙايا دار taṛāyā-dār, s. m. One who dresses well and is particular in having fine and well made clothes.
subs: adj. & s.m. Showy, ostentatious, vain, foppish; — one who wears fine clothes, or is particular as to dress, &c., a fop.

ety: abst. of t̤irāz
def: s.f. Adorning, ornamenting.
more: s. f. in compos. Adorning, ornamenting.

ety: tar = Zend taro = S. तिरस्
def: s.m. Scale, balance, pair of scales
more: n. f. Z. tarāzūk ; A. mīzān , S. तुला. 1. A pair of scales; a balance. tarāzū honā , v. n. lit . to be put in the scales. To be finely balanced; to hit the mark. Tir tarāzū ho gayā .
s. f. A scale, a balance.
subs: (-meṅ), To be evenly balanced; to go quite through, or to pierce (an object), and be out equally on both sides (an arrow, &c.); to hit the mark.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ترازو (tarāzū).

ety: S. त्वरा
def: s.f. Quick time in music, a kind of musical tone.
s.m. = tarwar, q.v. s.f. A sword ( = tarwār)
subs: v.n. Sword to resound; to be busy with (one's) sword
v.n. To brandish a sword; to use a sword; to strike with the sword
v.n. Swords to be busy, to be fighting with swords
talwār khaiṅćnā, v.n. To unsheathe or draw the sword
s.f. The flash of a sword
v.t. To strike or cut with a sword, to use a sword
adv. 'Under the shadow of swords'; well-guarded.

def: adj. See s.v. tar. s.m. Thread, string; the warp or threads extended lengthwise in a loom; wire, cord, string of a musical instrument; uninterrupted series, line, continuation, succession; a letter-file; the electric telegraph ( = ṭār-barqī); a telegraphic message, telegram; a hair of a curl or ringlet; the hair-worm or guinea worm; the snout, sucking tube, or trunk of most winged insects; the antennæ or feelers of prawns, flies, &c.; a bit, piece
more: adj. Completely wet. تربترهونا tar-ba-tar honā, To drip with wet (but, generally) to be covered with blood.
subs: (-ke), To continue or repeat (an act) without interruption
s.f. The electric wire, electric telegraph; a telegram
(-ke), To take place uninterruptedly or continuously (an act), to be continued or repeated without interruption
adv. Piece by piece, piecemeal; distinctly; in pieces or shreds, tattered and torn
v.n. To speak in detail or distinctly
(-ke), To tear to pieces or into shreds
(-ke), To be broken in continuity; to be interrupted; to be disjointed; to be separated
s.m. A kind of needlework, open work; pulling out some threads, &c.
s.f. A kind of needlework, any fine cloth run with gold or silver thread
s.m. A drawer of gold or silver wire
tār-kashī. s.f. Wire-drawing; a kind of needlework
(-kā), To find or obtain a clue (to)

ety: inf. n. ii of ربع 'to make four,' &c.
def: s.f. Dividing into four: making a quadrangular or square figure; squaring, multiplying a number by itself ; (in Astron.) a quadrangular aspect of the stars, quartile, quadrature; an angle of 90 degrees.
more: (inf. ii. of ربع) s. f. 1. Dividing into four, making a quadrangular or square figure. 2. (in astronomy) A quadrangular aspect of the stars, a quartile, quadrature.

ety: for A. تربية, inf. n. ii of ربو 'to grow up,' &c.
def: s.f. Bringing up, rearing, fostering, nurturing, breeding; training, education, cultivation, tuition, instruction; correction
more: n. f. ربيت reared, ربا increased. Education; training; cultivation; bringing up; breeding.

(inf. ii. of ربي Heb. He increased) s. f. Education, instruction, tuition, bringing up, breeding, correction. تربيت پذير tarbiyat-paẕīr, Docile, tractable. تربيت کرنا tarbiyat karnā, To educate, to instruct.
subs: adj. Capable of receiving instruction, &c.; docile, tractable, teachable
(-kī), To bring up, rear, foster, cherish, educate, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَرْبِیَت (tarbiyat), borrowed from Arabic تَرْبِيَة (tarbiya), from رَبَّى (rabbā). First attested in c. 1695 as Middle Hindi تربیت (trbyt).

def: s.f. = tal-ćhaṭ, q.v.
more: s. f. Dregs, sediment, lees. See تلچهٿ talchhaṭ.

Thread, string; the warp or threads extended lengthwise in a loom; wire, cord, string of a musical instrument; uninterrupted series, line, continuation, succession; a letter-file; the electric telegraph ( = ṭār-barqī); a telegraphic message, telegram; a hair of a curl or ringlet; the hair-worm or guinea worm; the snout, sucking tube, or trunk of most winged insects; the antennæ or feelers of prawns, flies, &c.; a bit, piece

def: s. f. Expertness, activity.

ety: inf. n. ii of ردّ 'to reject'
def: s.f. Repelling, opposing; refutation, rebutment; rejection, setting aside, reversal (of a decision)
more: n. f. 1. Refutation; rebutment; rebutter. 2. Reversal (of a judgment). tardīd k . v. a. 1. To rebut; refute; confute; disprove; dispose (of an argument). 2. To reverse; set aside; annul; repeal.
(inf. ii. of ردّ) s. f. Repelling, opposing. حرف ترديد ḥarf-i-tardīd, The disjunctive conjunction, يا yā, Or.
subs: (-kī), To repel, refute, rebut, disprove; to set aside, reverse, annul, repeal.

ety: inf. n. ii of ردف 'to ride behind'
def: s.f. Following, coming after.
more: (inf. ii. of ردف) s. f. The coming after.

def: postpn. = tale, q.v.s.v talā. s.m. The palmyra-tree or fan-palm ( = tāṛ, q.v.); — clapping the hands together; slapping the hands on the arms in defiance (in wrestling = tāṛī, q.v.); beating time (in music); musical time or measure; chime; a musical instrument of bell-metal or brass, a sort of cymbal (played with a stick); a pair of cymbals; — the glass or pebble of an eye-glass
subs: (˚la+ākh˚), s.f. A sort of vegetable perfume ( = tāl-parṇī)
s.m. The palm-leaf ( = tāṛ-patra, q.v.); — a hollow cylinder of gold (or a palm-leaf used as a substitute), with or without a ring attached, and thrust through the lobe of the ear as an ornament
s.f. A sort of anise, Anethum graveolens; a kind of vegetable perfume
s.m. A medicinal application to the eyes
v.n. To slap the arms defiantly (in wrestling = tāṛī ṭhoṅknā)
adj. & s.m. Having legs as long as a palm-tree; — name of a Rākshas; of a Daitya; of certain princes
v.t. To chime; to slap the arms ( = tāl ṭhoṅknā)
v.n. To get, or to be, out of tune
s.m. The medicinal herb Barleria (or Asteracantha) longifolia; the seeds of Solanum indicum (see makhānā)
s.m. Harmony, agreement, accord, &c. ( = ittifāq, q.v.); — tāl-mel khānā, v.n. To be in harmony, to agree, &c. ( = ittifāq honā)
tāl-vr̤int, s.m. A palm-leaf used as a fan; a fan.
wety: From Sanskrit त्रि (tri, “three”).

def: s.m. = taṛeṛā, q.v.
more: s. m. The falling of water from a spout, or from any height.

ety: S. तट or तड+eṛā = Prk. अअडओ = S. क+र or ल+कः
def: s.m. The falling of water from a spout, or from a height; a continuous stream of water from a height; the continuous pouring of water upon a bruise or wound.

ety: S. तरित्र+कः
def: s.m. Float (of a fishing line, &c.); a buoy ( = taret; tirendā).
n. m. 1. The falling of water from a spout; or from any height. Pānī ke tarerā dihalā se lehū band ho gail . Bhoj. 2. A float of a fishing line; a buoy.

ety: tarer˚ = S. तर rt. तॄ+कार
def: v.n. To stare; — v.t. To stare at.

ety: S. तरित्रं
def: s.m. A float; a buoy.

ety: Zend tiraśća; S. तिरश्र्ची
def: s.f. A cross-piece put in to enlarge the sleeve or skirt of a garment, a gusset.
more: s. f. The pieces in a vestment that are cut transversely or diagonally.

ety: for A. t̤arafain, obl. dual of t̤araf
def: s.f. The two extremities or ends (of a thing); the two sides (of); — s.m. Both sides, both parties, the two parties (in a law-suit, &c.)
more: n. m. Both parties; the parties concerned ( jānibain ). tarfain-i-silsilah ; S. आथांतश्रेठी The extreme terms of a series.
s. (dual of طرف) Both sides, both parties.
subs: The two ends of a chain; the extreme terms of a series.

def: The twinkling of an eye.
more: (prop. t̤arfatu-l-aﻌin ) The twinkling of an eye.

ety: inf. n. ii of رغب 'to desire'
def: s.f. Exciting desire, incitement, instigation, stimulation, incentive; inducement; temptation, allurement, lure, bait
more: n. f. رغبت desiring greatly. 1. Exciting desire; inducement; encouragement; incitement; instigation; stimulation. 2. Allurement; lure; sop; bait; decoy. targīb denā , v. a. 1. To persuade; induce; encourage; incite; entice; excite. 2. To allure; lure; tempt; cajole; decoy. 3. To put up to; influence; set on; instigate; abet.
(inf. ii. of رغبت) s. f. Exciting desire, incitement, instigation, temptation, stimulation. ترغيب دينا targ̠ẖīb denā, To set agog, excite, incite, to tempt, entice, induce.
subs: (-kī), To stimulate, incite, instigate, excite, induce; to entice, tempt, allure.

ety: inf. n. of طرح 'to throw, cast,' &c.
def: s.f. Throwing; ejection; laying (a foundation); fixing (a position, &c.); foundation (of a building, &c.); position, establishment, location; plan, design; form, description, sort, kind; manner, mode; air (syn. andāz); state, condition (syn. ḥāl); a verse set, showing the particular metre in which a poem is to be composed
more: n. f. See chhab . 1. From; description ( bhāṅt ). 2. A plan; design. 3. Air; manner ( andāz , 3). 4. State ( hāl , 1). 5. Foundation; base. 6. A line or verse set, shewing the metre in which the poem is to be written. Kaho ab ke kyā tarah huī hai? tarah ba-tarah, tarah tarah kā , adj. Of various sorts; diversified ( bhāṅt bhāṅt kā ). Tarah ba-tarah ke phūl khil rahe the. tarah-dār , adj. Stylish; graceful; handsome. tarah-dārī , n. f. Style; grace. tarah denā , v. a. 1. To disregard; overlook; pass over. 2. To turn a deaf ear to; give the go-bye. tarah, yā andāz dikhānā , v. a. To show off one's airs and graces; to affect. is tarah se, is tarah . Accordingly. is tarah jab tak ki ye hāl rahe. Toties quoties. burī tarah, be-tarah , adv. Badly; severely; shamefully; disgracefully. kis tarah , adv. In what way; how. kisī tarah , adv. Anyhow; somehow or other. kaī tarah se . In many respects …

s. f. 1. Manner, mode. 2. Position, establishment. 3. Ejection, throwing. طرح بطرح t̤arḥ ba-t̤arḥ, Various sorts. طرحدار t̤araḥ-dār, adj. Beautiful, graceful, well-shaped. طرحداري t̤araḥ-dār-ī, s. f. Beauty, elegance. طرح کش t̤arh-kash, Sketching, imitating.
subs: adj. Well-shaped, beautiful, graceful:-t̤araḥ-dārī, s.f. Beauty, elegance, grace, style
To exhibit (one's) airs and graces; to affect
(or t̤araḥ) denā (-ko), To throw away, cast aside; to disregard, overlook, pass over, or by, unnoticed; to turn a deaf ear (to)
adj. Drawing a plan (of), designing; sketching; imitating
adv. In this way, thus, accordingly
adv. In a bad way, badly, severely, shamefully, disgracefully
In what manner? how? — kisī t̤araḥ, adv. Anyhow; somehow or other
adv. In many ways; in many respects.
ex: یہ کس طرح سے بنا ہے؟
ye kis tarah se banā hai?
By what method is this made?
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian طرح (tarh, “plan, design”), from Arabic طَرْح (ṭarḥ, “teaching, deduction”).

def: v. n. (dakh.) See تڙپهنا taṛaphnā.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), Enabling or causing to get over or across; saving; — saviour, deliverer ( = tāraṇ).
more: n. f. Palm juice or toddy.
s. f. 1. The clapping of hands. 2. A key. 3. Abstraction, absence of mind, absorption in thought or devotion.

ety: S. ताली
def: s.f. The juice of the palmyra-tree, palm-wine, toddy; — the hilt of a dagger; — slapping the arms in defiance (in wrestling)
more: s. f. The juice of the palm tree. (Corrupt. Toddy).
s. f. Hilt of a dagger.
subs: v.n. To slap the arms in defiance
s.m. The man who climbs palmyra trees and extracts the juice or toddy from them.
wety: From تاڑ (tāṛ, “palmyra, toddy palm”) + ـی (-ī), ultimately from Dravidian.

ety: S. तड+इका
def: s.f. Beating, punishment; loss; cheating, fraud, deceit.
s.f. A small axe, a hatchet.

ety: act. part. of طرأ or طرو 'to come unexpectedly' (upon
def: part. adj. Coming unexpectedly, intervening, happening
more: part. act. (of طري) Happening, occurring, intervening.
subs: (-par), To come unexpectedly (on or over), to overcome, overshadow.

def: v. n. To prevail over; overcome; overshadow. Aisī dahshat tārī huī ki bol na sakā .

ety: fr. tār
def: s.f. Darkness, &c. ( = tārīkī, q.v.). s.f. Darkness, obscurity.

ety: from tar
def: s.f. Freshness, juiciness, ripeness; moisture, dampness, humidity, wetness; water (in opp. to ḵẖushkī, 'dry land'); low lands on the bank of a river, &c., land covered with water, moist soil, marsh, swamp; — sugar; — tari-se, adv. By water
subs: s.f. & adv. Water-route, journey by water; — by water.
wety: From Sanskrit त्रि (tri, “three”).

def: s.f. A key, &c. ( = tālī, q.v.); — absence of mind, abstraction, absorption in thought or devotion.
s.f. A boat.
more: n. f. 1. Moisture; dampness; wet. 2. Water (opposite of barrī land). 3. Freshness; juiciness; ripeness. 4. Low lands on the banks of rivers. 5. Moist land; swamp; marsh. tarī kī rāh, tarī kā safar , n. m. Passage by sea; a voyage.
n. f. 1. Beating; punishment. 2. Cheat; deceit; gammon. 3. Loss.
adj. Three. 2. tare, adv. Under: see تلي tale.
s. f. 1. Moisture, freshness, water (in opposition to dry land). 2. Sugar. تري سي tarī se, adv. By water.
wety: From Sanskrit त्रि (tri, “three”).

ety: v.n. from ṭārnā
def: s.f. Distance, remoteness, interval (syn. antar; tafāwut).

ety: inf. n. ii of عرف 'to know'
def: s.f., lit. 'Making known'; explaining (a term, &c.), explanation; description; making determinate, defining, a definition; introduction (to a person); praising, praise, commendation; — a table of rates of export and import duties (hence the European 'tariff')
more: n. f. عرف knew. 1. A definition (of a term); a description. 2. Praise; commendation; laudation. 3. An introduction to a person. See اوصاف 4. (Eng. tariff) A table of rates of export and import duties, in which sense the word has been adopted in English and other European languages (probably through the Spanish from the Arabic). tārīf-ul-majhūl bil-majhūl . Explaining in terms as little understood as the thing intended to be explained.

(inf. ii. of عرف) s. f. 1. Explanation, description. 2. Praise, praising. 3. Assertion. تعريف المحجـﮩول بالمحجـﮩول taﻌrīfu-l-majʼhūl bi-l-majʼhūl, Explaining in terms as little understood as the thing intended to be explained.
subs: 'Explaining the unknown by the unknown,' explaining in terms as little understood as the thing intended to be explained.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَعْرِیف (ta'rīf), borrowed from Arabic تَعْرِيف (taʕrīf), from عَرَّفَ (ʕarrafa).

def: s.f. pl. (of taʻrīf), Definitions, &c.
adj. Commendable; notable.

ety: act. part of ترك 'to abandon,' &c.
def: part. adj. & s.m. Leaving, forsaking, abandoning, relinquishing; — a deserter
more: (from ترک) part. act. Leaving; a deserter. تارک الدنيا tāriku-d-dunyā, 1. adj. Abandoning the world, abstinent, sober, chaste. 2. s. m. An anchoret, a hermit.
subs: adj. & s.m. Abandoning the world; abstinent, sober, chaste; — an anchorite, a recluse, hermit.

ety: Pehl. tārīk; fr. Z. tãthra, rt. tam = S. tam
def: adj. Dark, obscure
more: adj. Dark. تاريک چشم tārīk chashm, adj. Blind, dim-sighted.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تاریک (tārīk).

def: s.m. A ferry-man; a raft, float.
wety: From Classical Persian تُرک (turk), or conversely through Chagatai.

def: (v.n. fr. طرق 'to beat,' &c.), s.m. & f. 'A beaten track,' a road, way, path, course; mode, manner, fashion, &c. ( = t̤arīqa, q.v.).
more: n. f. طرق made away. 1. Way; road. 2. Manner ( ḍhaṅg , 1). 3. Custom; fashion ( chāl , 4.). 4. Rites; observances.
(from طرق) s. f. 1. Way, road. 2. Manner, custom, fashion. 3. Rite, religion. (Plur. طرق t̤uruḳ ).

def: s.m. Fare, freight, toll for passage.

r: t̤arīqa, t̤arīqat, t̤arīq, ahl-ě-tarīqat, ahl-ě-t̤arīqa, Sūfīs
def: s.m. = P طريقت t̤arīqat, s.f. (for A. طريقة, fr. t̤arīq, q.v.), A road, path, way, course, rule, mode of acting, &c., manner of conduct, &c., custom, fashion, established rule or usage; system; — religious ordinance, religion; sect; rite, observance; — the better sort (of people), the most excellent or the best (of a people, &c.)
more: s. m. 1. Way, path. 2. Manner, mode. 3. Religion, sect. 4. The better sort of people.
subs: s.m. pl. Devout or religious persons; devotees; the sect of Sūfīs.
ex: نیا کام کرنے کا طریقہ اپنانا چاہیے۔
nayā kām karne kā tarīqā apnānā cāhiye
You should adopt a new method of working.
اِس بات کرنے کا طریقہ صحیح نہیں ہے۔
is bāt karne kā tarīqā sahīh nahī̃ hai.
This manner of talking is not correct.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian طَرِیقَه (tarīqa), from Arabic طَرِيقَة (ṭarīqa).

ety: for A. ترکة tarikat, fem.
def: s.m. A legacy, bequest; inheritance; inheritance by succession or bequest; effects or estate of a deceased person
more: n. m. ترکه left. 1. A bequest; a legacy. 2. Inheritance; effects of the deceased; inheritance by succession or bequest; the estate or property of a deceased person. tarkah bilā vasīat-nāma . Intestate property. tarkah pāne-wālā , n. A legatee. tarkah-i-pidrī ; H. bapautī . Paternal estate. tarke meṅ ānā . To inherit; succeed to; descend; come into possession. tarke meṅ chhoṛnā . To leave; bequeath.
s. m. The estate of a deceased person.
subs: v.n. To come as a bequest, be obtained as an inheritance; — to descend (to); to succeed (to); to come into possession
v.t. To leave as a legacy, to bequeath.

ety: for A. ترکة
def: s.f. = tarika, q.v. s.m. Fare, freight, toll for passage.

r: t̤arīqat, t̤arīqa, t̤arīq, ahl-ě-tarīqat, ahl-ě-t̤arīqa, Sūfīs
def: s.f. = P طريقه t̤arīqa, s.m. (for A. طريقة, fr. t̤arīq, q.v.), A road, path, way, course, rule, mode of acting, &c., manner of conduct, &c., custom, fashion, established rule or usage; system; — religious ordinance, religion; sect; rite, observance; — the better sort (of people), the most excellent or the best (of a people, &c.)
more: s. f. 1. Way, path. 2. Manner, mode. 3. Religion, sect. 4. The better sort of people.
subs: s.m. pl. Devout or religious persons; devotees; the sect of Sūfīs.

ety: inf. n. ii of ارخ 'to date'; or, according to some, the Ar. form of Heb. יֶרַח or Ch. יְרַח 'a month'
def: s.f. Date, era, epoch; day (of a month); chronogram; chronicle, book of annals, history
more: n. f. ارخ dating a letter. 1. Date; day of the month. In recording dates of historical or memorable events the 28 letters of the Arabic language are generally used. Each of these has a certain numerical value attached, ranging from one to one thousand. 2. Epoch; era; chronology; annals; history; chronogram. tārīkh chaṛhānā , v. a. To enter the date; to date. tārīkh-wār , adv. According to date; at stated periods; in chronological order; periodically. falānī tārīkh se chaṛhtī . Calculated from a certain date.

(inf. ii. of obsol. ارخ He loosened, travelled: or, rather, from Heb. and Ch. A month) s. f. 1. Date, era, epoch, day (of a month); chronogram. 2. Annals, history. تاريخ الـﮩجره tārīḵẖu-l-hijra, The era of the Hijra. تاريخ وار tārīḵẖ-wār, adv. Daily, at stated periods.
subs: (-par), To put the date (on), to date
s.f. The era of the Hijra
adv. According to date, in chronological order; at stated periods, periodically; daily.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تاریخ (tārix), from Arabic تَارِيخ (tārīḵ).

def: s.f. Darkness, obscurity.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تاریکی (tārīkī).

def: Ped. The sun's course. tarīqa batānā , v. a. 1. To shew the way; to direct. 2. To point out the proper course. tarīqa-i-baṭvārā . Mode of partition. tarīqa baratnā , G. G. To work a system. tarīqa-i-hisāb . System of account. tarīqa-i-darbār . Forms and ceremonies proper to a darbār or levee; forms of state. tarīqa-i-amal-dar-āmad . Procedure. tarīqa-i-muqarrara-i-qānūn . The mode prescribed by law. tarīqa-i-munāsib . The proper mode. ahl-i-tarīqat . Devout or religious people, esp. Sūfīs. ba-tarīq, ba-taur , adv. In the way of; by way of; as though. ba-tarīq-i-amānat . By way of deposit. ba-tarīq-i-muflisī. In forma pauperis ; as a pauper. adālat meṅ talab karne kā tarīq . How brought before a court. muqaddama pesh karne kā tarīq . How a suit is to be brought.

ety: tar, q.v.; īn = Zend aêna = S. इन्
def: adj. Moist, fresh, &c. ( = tar, q.v.). s.m. Thread, string; the warp or threads extended lengthwise in a loom; wire, cord, string of a musical instrument; uninterrupted series, line, continuation, succession; a letter-file; the electric telegraph ( = ṭār-barqī); a telegraphic message, telegram; a hair of a curl or ringlet; the hair-worm or guinea worm; the snout, sucking tube, or trunk of most winged insects; the antennæ or feelers of prawns, flies, &c.; a bit, piece
subs: (-ke), To continue or repeat (an act) without interruption
s.f. The electric wire, electric telegraph; a telegram
(-ke), To take place uninterruptedly or continuously (an act), to be continued or repeated without interruption
adv. Piece by piece, piecemeal; distinctly; in pieces or shreds, tattered and torn
v.n. To speak in detail or distinctly
(-ke), To tear to pieces or into shreds
(-ke), To be broken in continuity; to be interrupted; to be disjointed; to be separated
s.m. A kind of needlework, open work; pulling out some threads, &c.
s.f. A kind of needlework, any fine cloth run with gold or silver thread
s.m. A drawer of gold or silver wire
tār-kashī. s.f. Wire-drawing; a kind of needlework
(-kā), To find or obtain a clue (to)

def: (see tar); an affix, the termination of the superlative degree in Persian (corresponding to the English termination -est, or the adverb 'most,' e.g. ḵẖūb-tarīn, 'fairest, most beautiful').
more: 1. A particle added to adjectives, to form the superlative degree; most, very. 2. adj. Moist, fresh, good.

ety: see tārī
def: s.f. Deliverer, saviour; a form of the goddess Durgā; name of a kind of goddess with Buddhists and Jains.

ety: S. taḍit
def: s.f. Lightning.
wety: Semi-learned borrowing from Sanskrit तडित् (taḍít).

def: s.m. A boat.
s.m. A boat.

ety: inf. n. ii of عرض 'to be broad,' &c.
def: s.f. Making broad or wide, enlarging; making conspicuous; rendering obnoxious; opposing, objecting; ambiguity or equivocation in speech; hinting at a subject obscurely or indirectly, insinuation (of wrong, or evil, &c.), making an allusion (to); — rendering intricate; writing indistinctly or illegibly; not dressing meat sufficiently; bartering, exchanging, barter, &c.; — a statement of particulars of landed property (deposited in a collector's office).
more: (inf. ii. of عرض) s. f. 1. Enlarging. 2. Making conspicuous. 3. Rendering obnoxious. 4. Ambiguity in speech or hinting at a subject obscurely, insinuation of evil. 5. Rendering intricate. 6. Making writing illegible. 7. Not dressing meat sufficiently. 8. Opposing, objecting. 9. Barter, exchange of one commodity for another.

ety: for A. ترجمة tarjamat, fem.
def: s.m. Interpretation; translation
more: n. m. ترجمه he interpreted in another language. Translation; version. tarjama k. , v. a. To translate; make a translation. lafzī tarjama . A literal translation.
s. m. Translation, interpretation. ترجمه کرنا tarjama karnā, To translate, to interpret. ترجمه نويس tarjuma-navīs, s. m. A translator. ترجمه هونا tarjama honā, To be interpreted or translated.
subs: s.m. A translator ( = mutarjim); — tarjama honā, v.n. To be interpreted or translated.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ترجمه (tarjama), from Arabic تَرْجَمَة (tarjama).

def: s.m. Threatening; blaming, censuring; pointing at in ridicule or contempt; wrath, anger.
s.m. = tarjan, q.v. s.m. Threatening; blaming, censuring; pointing at in ridicule or contempt; wrath, anger.
s.f. The fore-finger (as used for threatening).

ety: inf. n. ii of رجع 'to return,' &c.
def: s.f. Causing to return or recur, &c.
subs: s.m. A kind of stanza in which one line occurs at stated intervals. (It is, perhaps, only in this compound that the word tarjīʻ occurs in Urdū).

def: n. m. A. رجوع return, repetition. A stanza, in which one line recurs at stated intervals.
more: A kind of stanza, in which one line recurs at stated intervals. (From رجوع Return, repetition).

ety: inf. n. ii of رجح 'to excel; to outweigh,' &c.
def: s.f. Gaining a superiority; superiority, preference, excellence, pre-eminence, precedence
more: n. f. رجح the balance inclined, he excelled. Preference; superiority; pre-eminence; precedence. tarjīh denā , v. a. To prefer; give the preference to.

(inf. ii. of رجوح) s. f. Gaining a superiority, preference, excellence, preeminence. ترجيح بلامرجح tarjīḥ-i-bilā murajjaḥ, Unrea sonable preference. ترجيح دينا tarjīḥ denā, To prefer. ترجيح رکهنا tarjīḥ rakhnā, To excel, to surpass.
subs: v.t. To give (one thing, &c.) the preference (to, -par, another), to prefer (to)
(-par), To have precedence (over), to be superior (to), to excel, surpass.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَرْجِیح (tarjīh), from Arabic تَرْجِيح (tarjīḥ).

ety: S. तर्जनीयं, rt. तर्ज्
def: v.t. To threaten, to terrify; to censure.
s.m. An interpreter.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ترجمان (tarjumān), from Arabic تَرْجُمَان (tarjumān).

def: s.f. Interpreting; office of interpreter.

s.m. Supposition, conjecture; reasoning, speculation, inquiry, consideration, meditation, discussion, disputation; argument, objection, plea; doubt; the science of reasoning, logic; (in logic) a proposition
more: n. m. ترک he left it. 1. Relinquishment; abandonment; abdication; renunciation. 2. Omission. 3. A catchword. tark-i-adab , adj. 1. Disrespect; rudeness. 2. Boldness; presumption; presumptuousness. tark-i-dunyā . Renunciation of the world and its vanities or pleasures. tark karnā , v. a. To abandon. See تياگنا tark-i-vatan ; Ped. for H. des chhoṛan . Leaving one's native country; emigration. tark honā , v. n. To be in disuse, given up or abandoned.
n. m. 1. Objection; plea; argument. 2. Reasoning; logic; disputation; discussion. 3. (In logic.) A proposition. tark uṭhānā , v. a. To raise a plea or objection. tark shāstar, tark vidyā . Logic.

s. m. Abandoning, abandonment, omission, leaving, deserting, abdication. ترک ادب tark-i-adab, Disrespect. ترک کرنا tark karnā, To abandon, leave, forsake, leave off, quit, omit, cease, desert, resign.
s. m. 1. Logick. 2. (in logick) A proposition.
s. An iron helmet or cap worn in battle.
subs: v.n. To raise an objection or plea
s.m. = tark-vidyā, s.f. The science of reasoning or disputation, logic
v.t. To consider, investigate, reason, &c. ( = tarknā).
wety: From Classical Persian تُرک (turk), or conversely through Chagatai.

def: s.m. Abandoning, forsaking, leaving; setting aside; abandonment, desertion; relinquishment renunciation; abdication; omission, neglect; a catch-word
subs: s.m. Rudeness, incivility, disrespect; boldness, presumptuousness
v.t. To abandon, forsake, desert, leave, quit; to set aside; to give up, relinquish, renounce, resign; to leave off, desist from, cease (syn. tyāgnā)
s.m. Leaving one's native land, emigration
v.n. To be abandoned; to be given up; to be in disuse.
wety: From Classical Persian تُرک (turk), or conversely through Chagatai.

def: s.m. An iron helmet or cap (worn in battle).
wety: From Classical Persian تُرک (turk), or conversely through Chagatai.

ety: taṛak, q.v.+S. कः
def: v.n. To be day-break, to dawn; — to be broken, become bankrupt, to be reduced to poverty; to be roused, have the eyes opened, be brought to one's senses; to be astonished or astounded
more: s. m. Dawn of day. تڙکي taṛke, adv. In the morning early, at dawn of day.
subs: adv. At dawn or day-break, in the early morning, early.
wety: From تڑکنا (taṛaknā, “to crack, to break”).

ety: see tark
def: s.f. Logical reasoning.
more: n. m. Dawn; day break. taṛke , adv. At dawn; in the early morning. taṛkā honā , v. n. 1. To be dawn. 2. To be bankrupt, reduced to proverty. Sau rupaë nikal jāne se taṛkā ho gayā . 3. To be brought to one's senses, roused. Aise piṭe ki taṛkā ho gayā . 4. To be stunned; astonished; at one's wit's end. nūr kā taṛkā , Early in the morning; dawn.

ety: dialec.
def: v.t. To put off, &c. = ṭālnā, q.v. v.t. To fry; — v.n. To be fried (in butter or oil).
v. n. See. ṭāl'nā , 1, 2, 3. Āj to be-vazū hī tarkāo . Slang. To put off; evade; shuffle; give the go-by. Sūkhā ṭarkāyā . Slang.

ety: caus. of taṛaknā
def: v.t. To cause to crack, &c.; to crack, split, burst; to snap, break.
more: v. a. To crack, split, burst, &c. ( Harris ).

ety: cf. tara
def: s.f. Esculent vegetables; meat (in this sense used by Hindūs only).
more: n. f. Pahlvī. tarah ; Z. tarnekā . 1. Esculent vegetables ( tar-tarkārī ). 2. ( Hīn .) Meat. Tel takārī lā dū go ḍhebuā ḍhaile jā! Bhoj. Leave two pice for oil and vegetables. 2. A tax imposed on gardens or ground on which vegetables are grown, especially ginger, turmeric, tobacco, etc., on which a higher rate of assessment is usually levied.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تره (tara, “vegetable”) + Tamil கறி (kaṟi). Compare Assamese তৰকাৰী (torkari), Bengali তরকারী (torkari).

ety: S. तीर+कोश
def: s.m. A quiver
more: n. m. A quiver. 1. Laṛeṅ na bhiṛeṅ, tarkash bāṅdhe phireṅ . Prov. With bow and arrow girt; but not for fight. 2. Tarkash meṅ do tīr nahīṅ, par sharmā sharmī laṛte haiṅ . Prov. Not an arrow left in his quiver, he fights on for very shame.
s. m. A quiver. ترکش بند tarkash-band, Wearing a quiver.

def: n. f. Wire drawing. tār-ghar , n. m. Telegraph office. tār-nikālnā , v. a. Wom. To find a clue.

ety: S. त्वर+ग?+कः
def: adj. Swift, rapid (as a stream).
s.f. A contemptuous epithet for a woman; an old jade; a low-priced trull, a drab.
more: s. m. A contemptuous epithet for a woman, a low priced trull, a drab.

ety: inf. n. ii of رخم 'to become soft, or easy'
def: s.f. Curtailing, abbreviating; abbreviation, contraction, apocope.
more: n. f. رخم Cutting off at the end. ( Gram .) Cutting off the final letter or syllable; apocope.
(inf. ii. of رخم) s. f. Abbreviation, contraction, apocope (in grammar).

def: s.m. = tarkin, q.v. s.m. A follower of the Tark-śāstra; a logician, disputant, reasoner.
more: n. f. H. tāṛ palm tree. An ear-ring originally made of tāṛ leaves, worn by women.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ترکی (turkī). By surface analysis, ترک (turk) + ـی (-ī).

ety: S. ताडंक+इका; ताड = ताल
def: s.f. A kind of ear-ring worn by women (made originally of the tāṛ leaf).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ترکی (turkī). By surface analysis, ترک (turk) + ـی (-ī).

ety: inf. n. ii of رکب 'to overlie,' &c.
def: s.f. Putting together, combining, mixing; setting (a stone); composition; compound; mixture; construction, structure, make, mechanism; form, fashion, mode, method, arrangement; means, plan, contrivance
more: n. f. A. رکب overlaid. 1. Formation; construction; composition. 2. Form; fashion; mode. 3. ( Gram .) Analysis; parsing ( anve ). 4. Plan; scheme; arrangement. (Erroneously for tadbīr , q. v.) tarkīb-band , n. m. A stanza. tarkīb denā , v. a. 1. To make; construct; organize. 2. To form; shape; fashion; mould. tarkīb se , adv. 1. Economically; carefully. 2. Somehow or other; by hook or by crook; as best one can. tarkīb k .; H. anve k . v. n. To parse; analyse; construe. be-tarkīb , adv. Excessively; without measure. Be-tarkīb khāyā aur okā .

(inf. ii. of رکب) s. f. Composition, mixture, cement, make, form, fashion, mechanism. ترکيب بند tarkīb-band, A kind of poem. ترکيب دار tarkīb-dār, Well-formed. ترکيب کرنا tarkīb karnā, To organize. (Plur. ترکيبات tarkībāt, Mixtures, compositions).
subs: (kī), To exhibit the structure (of a clause or sentence), to coustrue, to analyse
s.m. A particular kind of metrical composition; a stanza
(-ko), To give form or shape (to), to form, fashion; to make, construct, organize
adv. In due proportion; in proper form, or measure, &c.; economically; carefully
(-kī), To construct, frame, organize; to construe, &c. ( = tarkīb batānā).

def: s.f. pl. (of tarkīb), Compositions; compounds; mixtures, &c.
adj. Composed; compounded, mixed; artful, artificial.
adj. & s.m. Related or belonging to the science of reasoning or logic; — a dialectician, logician, philosopher, sophist; a follower of one of the six schools of Hindū philosophy.

ety: inf. n. ii of رقّ 'to be thin,' &c.
def: s.f. Thinning; dilution; rarefaction; softening.
more: (inf. ii. of رقّت) s. f. Softening, thinning, dilution, rarefaction.

def: s.m. The tree Cassia tora.

ety: inf. n. ii of رقم 'to mark, stamp,' &c.
def: s.f. Marking, figuring (cloth, &c.); writing, noting.
more: (inf. ii. of رقم) s. f. Writing, noting.

def: s.m. A follower of the Tark-śāstra; a logician, disputant, reasoner.
part. adj. Investigated, examined, discussed; disputed, doubted; doubtful; disputatious; — s.m. A disputatious person.

ety: tark˚ = S. तर्कय(ति), rt. तर्क
def: v.t. To consider, investigate, reason or speculate about; to discuss, dispute, doubt, &c. (see tark).
more: v. a. To remonstrate; object; argue; dispute; discuss.
v. n. P. tarqīdan to split. 1. To be cracked, split. 2. To be angry, in a rage. Miyāṅ taṛakhte kyoṅ ho?

def: s.m. A kind of bird; a kind of plant; also = next, q.v.
more: n. m. A drawer of gold or silver wire.

def: s.m. A name of the bird garuṛ, q.v.
s.f. A spindle, a distaff; an iron pin upon which the cotton is first drawn out (syn. takuʼā, taklā)
subs: s.m. and tarku-pīṭhī, s.f. A ball of clay, &c., at the lower end of a spindle to arsist in giving it a rotatory motion
s.m. A small whetstone for sharpening spindles, &c.
s.m. A concave shell or saucer which serves to hold the lower end of the spindle when wheeled round.

ety: S. ताड+अङ्कुरः
def: s.m. The fruit of the palmyra ( = tāṛ-phal).
more: s. m. ( ताडांकुर ) The fruit of the tāṛ tree (Borassus flabelliformis).

def: s.m. (?) Name of the secondary form (ु) of the letter उ.

ety: see ترکو tarku
def: s.m. Drawing out the cotton upon the distaff or upon the wheel; spinning.
s.f. A spindle, a distaff ( = tarku).

ety: S. तरल+कः
def: s.m. Bottom, depth, lower or under part ( = talā); a kind of bamboo; — adj. Lower, nethermost.
more: 1. s. m. A kind of bamboo. 2. adj. Lower, nethermost.

ety: inf. n. ii of رم 'to repair'
def: s.f. Repairing, putting in a sound state; rectifying; rectification, improvement, amendment; modification, alteration
more: n. m. A رم mending. 1. Amendment; modification; alteration; revision; re-adjustment. 2. Improvement; melioration; rectification. tarmīm k . v. n. 1. To amend; mend; modify; alter; change. 2. To rectify; improve; meliorate.
subs: (-kī), To mend, repair, put in a sound state, to rectify, &c.

ety: tār˚ = Prk. तार(इ) or तारे(इ); S. तारय(ति), rt. तॄ
def: v.t. To enable (one) to cross; to free, rid (of); to deliver, save; to absolve from sin; to exempt from further transmigration.
more: v. a. To help one across (the Styx); deliver from sin; exempt from further transmigration.

v. a. S. तड to strike or hit. 1. To perceive; understand; make out. 2. To see through; look through and through; dive into; penetrate; find out; fathom; to take one's measure (a character). Masjid bhī ādmī ne banāī hai yāṅ, miyāṅ, Bante haiṅ ādmī hī imām aur khutbah-khuāṅ, Paṛhte haiṅ ādmī hī Qurān o namāz yāṅ, Aur ādmī hī unkī churāte haiṅ jūtiyāṅ, Jo unko tāṛtā hai, so hai woh bhī ādmī. Ādmī-nāmah . Man. Nazīr. The temple too, my friend, is raised by human hands, 'Tis men are made imāms , and readers of the khutbah , 'Tis men read the Quran and prayers in this world, And they are also men who steal the shoes of these, And they who ken them well, why they are also men. ☞ In the Jāmā Masjid shoes are taken off and left in the outer court, and when the faithful are intent on prayer the profane sometimes manage to carry off the shoes which they slip into a covered. empty bird cage taken fo…
n. m. Beating; whipping; corporal punishment; penalty. tāṛ'yā, tāṛū, tāṛ-bāz , adj. Intelligent; quick of apprehension.
v. a. To free, to rid, to exempt from further transmigration, to absolve from sin, to save.

ety: tāṛ˚ = Prk. तड्ड(इ), or तड्डे(इ) = S. तर्कय(ति), rt. तर्क्
def: v.t. To understand, perceive, apprehend, comprehend; to become aware of; to discover, find out; to judge, conceive; to conjecture, guess
subs: v.n. To become aware, to apprehend, &c.
v.t. To look into, examine, test; to find out, &c.

ety: Prk. तरणअं; S. तरणीयं, rt. त्ऋ
def: v.t. To cross, pass over, traverse; — v.n. To be ferried over, to pass (over); to be saved.
more: v. n. To pass over, to be ferried; to be saved.

def: s.m. Crack, report (of fire-arms, &c.), clap (of thunder).
v.t. = ṭālnā, q.v. v.t. To fry; — v.n. To be fried (in butter or oil).
more: v. a. To move out of the way. See ٿالنا ṭālnā.

def: s.f. Shooting or throbbing pain, dart, throb, stitch (syn. ćasak; ṭīs).
more: s. f. Shooting pain, stitch, throb.

def: n. f. Shooting pain; stitch; throb.

ety: inf. n. v of سخر 'to mock'
def: s.m. Mocking, mockery, irony, ridicule, derision; — subduing, making obedient or tractable, &c. ( = next, q.v.).
more: (inf. v. of سخر) s. m. 1. Ridicule. 2. Subduing, making tractable.

ety: tasak, q.v.+nā = Prk. अणअं = S. अनीयं
def: v.n. To move, shake, stir; to shoot, dart, throb (with pain), to feel pain; — to decline (in quality), to abate.
more: v. n. 1. To move, to shake. 2. To have pain. 3. To decline in quality.

def: v. n. 1. To move; stir. 1. Baṛ bhārī bā, hamrā būte ne ṭaskī . Bhoj. It is very heavy, I cannot move it. 2. Binā le-le kahāṅ ṭaskī? Bhoj. Not an inch will he stir till he gets something. 2. To be boiled. Ek chāval bhī nahīṅ ṭaskā . 3. E. To feel pain.

ety: inf. n. v of سلو 'to become forgetful'
def: adj. Consolatory, comforting
more: n. f. سلي became consoled. 1. Consolation; comfort; solace. 2. Assurance; satisfaction. tasallī denā , v. a. See taskīn denā .

(inf. v. of سلي or سلا Heb. He was quiet) s. f. Consolation, comfort, solace. تسلي بخش tasallī-baḵẖsh, adj. Consolatory, comforting. تسلي دينا tasallī denā, To comfort, to assure, to secure, to animate, to exhilarate, to console. تسلي هونا tasallī honā, To be consoled or comforted.
subs: (-ko), To impart comfort (to), to minister consolation (to), to comfort, console, cheer, exhilarate, animate; to assure
v.n. To derive comfort (from), to be consoled, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَسَلّی (tasallē), from Arabic تَسَلٍّ (tasallin).

ety: inf. n. v of سلط 'to prevail'
def: s.m. Exercising absolute dominion; absolute rule, domination, sway.
more: (inf. v. of سلط Heb. He ruled) s. m. Domination, sway, absolute rule.

ety: inf. n. ii of سلسل 'to bind with a chain,' &c.
def: s.m. Running down, flowing (water); being joined, adhering as the links of a chain; concatenation, sequence, series, succession; association (of ideas).
more: n. m. A. سلسل rippled like a chain. S. srī to flow. A connected chain; concatenation; series; succession.
(inf. ii. of سلسله) s. m. 1. Connecting like a chain, concatenation, association of ideas, infinite series, succession. 2. Flowing (as, of water).

ety: inf. n. vi of سمح 'to be generous,' &c.
def: s.m. Reciprocal generosity or indulgence, mutual kindness, or forgiveness, &c.; conniving (at), connivance; careless or defective manner of expression; double meaning (syn. tasāhul).
more: (inf. vi. of سمح) s. m. 1. Reciprocal indulgence, mutual kindness and forgiveness, connivance. 2. Double meaning.

def: n. f. Dispute; contention; strife.

ety: see ṭhās
def: s.f. Bursting (as of anything too full, or stretched, or tight), splitting, cracking; breach, split, dispute, contention, strife.
s.f. pl. (of taṣnīf), Literary compositions, works.

ety: inf. n. v of صنع 'to make, construct, &c.'
def: s.m. Making a display of art, studying to make a fair appearance; showing a specious exterior; speciousness; embellishment; fabrication; alteration (of a thing) so as to present a specious appearance, falsification.
more: n. m. صنع wrought, forged. Fabrication; falsification; alteration.
(inf. v. of صنع) s. m. Making a show of art, pretending to an art, speciousness.

ety: inf. n. v of سن 'to pursue a good course'
def: s.m. Following a sannat, regulating one's course of life; being or becoming a Sunnī.
(inf. v. of سنّت) s. m. The being or becoming a Sunnī.

ety: S. त्रसरः
def: s.m. A shuttle; a kind of coarse silk, the produce of the worm Bombyx paphia, that feeds on the aśan-tree; (also written ṭasar).
more: W. n. m. S. त्रसर An inferior sort of silk, the produce of a worm that feeds on the āsām found wild in many parts of India ( Bombyx paphia ).
s. m. A kind of coarse silk, the produce of a particular worm (Bombyx paphia) that feeds on the āsan (Terminalia alata tomentosa), &c.

ety: Prk. टसरो; S. त्रसरः
def: s.m. A coarse kind of silk ( = tasar).
s.f. (colloq.), Hesitation, delay.

ety: inf. n. v of صرف 'to turn,' &c.
def: s.m. Turning, changing (cf. taṣrīf); employment, use, application; possession, occupancy, sway; holding at (one's) disposal, disposal; expenditure, expenses; extravagance; diverting from (its) proper use, misapplication, misappropriation, embezzlement; power, influence, art, cunning; supernatural power (as affected by holy men among Muslims)
more: n. m. صرف exchanging. 1. Expenditure; expenses. 2. Use; employment; application. 3. Possession; occupancy; enjoyment. 4. Holding at one's own disposal; property. 5. Supernatural power (of holy men). tasarruf k., tasarruf meṅ lānā , v. n. 1. To spend; expend; apply. 2. To occupy; use; take possession of; enjoy. 3. To misappropriate; misapply; embezzle.

(inf. v. of صرف) s. m. 1. Possession, use, sway. 2. Expenditure, disposal, embezzlement, extravagance. تصرف کرنا or تصرف مين لانا taṣarruf karnā, or taṣarruf meṅ lānā, To take or get possession of, to apply to oneʼs own purpose, embezzle, occupy. Plur. تصرفات taṣarrufāt (in general acceptation for) The sum total of expenses.
subs: (-ko, or -par), To turn (from), to change; to use, employ; to apply to one's own purpose or use; to spend; to take or get possession (of), to occupy; to misapply, misappropriate, embezzle
v.t. To bring into use; to take possession (of), &c. = taṣarruf karnā, q.v.

def: s.m. pl. (of taṣarruf), Possessions; usages, licences (of poetry); sum total of expenses.

ety: fr. taṣarruf
def: s.f. Common provisions given to dependants (as opp. to ḵẖāṣṣa, or what the master and the company eat).
more: s. f. Common provisions given to dependants, &c. (خاصه ḵẖāṣṣa, being what the master and his company eat).

ety: inf. n. vi of صعد 'to ascend'
def: s.m. Ascending, going up; becoming difficult.
more: (inf. vi. of صعد) s. m. Ascending, becoming difficult.

ety: inf. n. vi of سوي 'to be equal'
def: s.f. Equality, likeness, similarily, sameness, neutrality.
more: (inf. vi. of سوي Heb. Was equal) s. f. Similarity, sameness, equality, neutrality.

def: s.f. pl. (of taṣwīr), Pictures, portraits.

ety: inf. n. v of صوف ; — prob. formed from ṣūfī
def: s.m. The theology of the Sūfīs or mystics of the East; mysticism; devoting oneself to contemplation; contemplation.
more: n. m. The theology of the Sūfīs or mystics of the East; mysticism. ilm-í-tasavvuf , Mah; bedānt , Hin. n. m. A philosophical system.
(inf. v. of صوف) s. m. The theology of the ṣūfīs or mysticks of the east; mystery, contemplation.

ety: inf. n. v of صور 'to form or fashion,' &c.
def: s.m. Imaging or picturing (a thing) to the mind; imagination, fancy; reflection, contemplation, meditation; forming an idea; idea, conception, perception, apprehension
more: n. m. صور became pictured. 1. Imagination; fancy; reflection; contemplation. 2. Idea; thought; conception.
(inf. v. of صورت) s. m. Imagination, contemplation, meditation, reflection, fancy, idea, conception, preconception, apprehension. تصورکرنا taṣauwur karnā, To imagine, to fancy.
subs: v.t. To picture to ooneself; to imagine, fancy; to regard, consider, suppose; to conceive, apprehend, &c.
wety: From Arabic تَصَوَّرَ (taṣawwara).

ety: inf. n. ii of سبح which is syn. with ii
def: s.f. The declaring God to be far removed or free from every imperfection or impurity, magnifying or praising God (saying subḥānaʼllāh, 'I extol the perfection of God'); the act of praying; — a string or chaplet of beads, a rosary
more: n. f. 1. A chaplet or string of beads. Mah. 2. A rosary, which should consist of a hundred beads of different seeds, woods, or precious stones, and which are turned over as the prayers are repeated. Tasbīh pherūṅ, kisko gherūṅ? Prov. My beads I tell—'whom shall I sell?' 3. The act of praising God by repeating the sentence ' Subhān Allāh ,' 'Glory be unto the Lord.'

(inf. ii. of سبح Heb. He praised) s. f. 1. The act of praising God. 2. A rosary, a chaplet of beads (not applied to a Hindū rosary). تسبيح خانه tasbīḥ-ḵẖāna, A chapel. تسبيح خوان tasbīḥ-ḵẖẉān, 1. Saying prayers. 2. A person hired to pray for another, a private chaplain. تسبيح خواني tasbīḥ-ḵẖẉān-ī, The office of a chaplain.
subs: adj. & s.m. Singing praise to God, vocal in praise to God; saying prayers; — a singer of praise to God; one hired to pray, a private chaplain
s.f. The office of a chaplain.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَسْبِیح (tasbīh), from Arabic تَسْبِيح (tasbīḥ).

ety: inf. n. ii of صدع 'to cleave, split'
def: s.f. Headache; worry, annoyance, vexation, perplexity; toil, trouble, affliction, sorrow, care
more: (inf. ii. of صدع) s. f. 1. The headach. 2. Affliction, trouble, annoyance, vexation, toil, perplexity. (Plur. تصديعات). تصديع دينا taṣdīﻌ denā, To incommode, trouble, vex, tease, harass, distress, pester, plague, annoy. تصديع کرنا taṣdīﻌ karnā, To take the trouble.
subs: v.n. To experience trouble, or sorrow, &c.; to take trouble
(-ko), To give trouble (to), to trouble, incommode, annoy, vex, worry, harass, distress, pester, plague
v.n. To take trouble ( = taṣdīʻ uṭhānā).

def: s.m. corr. of taṣdīʻ, q.v. s.f. Headache; worry, annoyance, vexation, perplexity; toil, trouble, affliction, sorrow, care
more: n. m. A. صدع split. Trouble; difficulty; care; hardship. tasdīā uṭhānā , v. n. To take trouble. tasdīā denā , v. n. To give trouble.
subs: v.n. To experience trouble, or sorrow, &c.; to take trouble
(-ko), To give trouble (to), to trouble, incommode, annoy, vex, worry, harass, distress, pester, plague
v.n. To take trouble ( = taṣdīʻ uṭhānā).

ety: inf. n. ii of صدق 'to speak truth,' &c.
def: s.f. Proving true, confirming the truth (of), verifying, attesting; acknowledging the truth (of); confirmation, proof, verification, attestation; appeal
more: n. f. from صدق truth. Attestation; verification; authentication; confirmation; corroboration. tasdīq k . v. n. 1. To testify; attest; certify; verify. 2. To confirm; ratify; affirm; maintain. tasdīq karne-vālā shakhs . G. G. The person attesting; an auditor. ba-tasdīq . Under one's own hand or signature; in witness of. sāhib-i-tasdīq . The attesting officer; public notary.
(inf. ii. of صدق) s. f. Verifying, attesting, verification, acknowledging as true, attestation, appeal. تصديق بلاتصور taṣdīḳ-i-bilā taṣauwur, Presupposition.
subs: (-kī), To confirm, prove to be true, to verify, attest, &c.
v.n. To be confirmed, be verified, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَصْدِیق (tasdīq), from Arabic تَصْدِيق (taṣdīq).

ety: inf. n. ii of سدس 'to become six'
def: Making six; dividing into six parts; making of a hexagonal form; a sextile aspect of the stars.
more: (inf. ii. of سدس) s. f. 1. Dividing into six parts. 2. A sextile aspect of the stars.

ety: for A. تصفية taṣfiyat, fem., inf. n. ii of صفو 'to be pure'
def: s.m. Clearing, making clear; clearance; purifying (particularly the mind from ill-will); purification, purgation; purity; reconciliation; settlement, adjustment, disposal (of a case, &c.)
more: n. m. صفر was pure. 1. Purifying (esp. the mind from ill-will); purification; purity. 2. Reconciliation; settlement (of a debt). 3. Disposal (of a case); adjustment; decision. tasfīya k . v. n. 1. To reconcile; effect a compromise or reconciliation; adjust (a dispute). 2. To dispose of; settle; arbitrate. āpas meṅ tasfīya . Amicable adjustment; private arbitration or arrangement.
(inf. ii. of صفا) s. m. 1. Purifying (particularly, the mind from ill will), purification, purgation, purity. 2. Reconciling, reconciliation.
subs: adj. Requiring adjustment, &c.; to be settled, determined, or decided
(-kā), To effect a reconciliation, to reconcile; to effect a compromise; to settle, adjust, dispose (of).

ety: inf. n. ii of صغر 'to be small or little'
def: s.f. Lessening; diminution; a diminutive noun.
more: n. m. صغر he was Small. Diminution; a diminutive noun.
(inf. ii. of صغر Heb. Was small) s. f. Diminution, a diminutive noun.

ety: inf. n. v. of شبہہ
def: s.m. Likeness, resemblance, similitude (cf. next, as also tashābǒh).
(inf. v. of شبه) s. m. Resemblance, similitude.

ety: inf. n. vi of شبہہ
def: s.m. Likeness, resemblance, similitude, similarity.
(inf. vi. of شبه) s. m. Similitude, resemblance, likeness.

ety: inf. n. v of شدّ 'to make hard, firm,' &c.
def: s.m. Seizing or holding firmly or by force; showing vehemence or severity; intensity; aggravation; rigour, severity; hardship; — adj. Strong, robust; strengthened, confirmed, corroborated (cf. next).
more: n. m. A. شد he intensified it. Aggravation; severity; hardship.
(from شدّ) 1. s. m. Seizing and holding firmly or by force, shewing vehemence or severity. 2. adj. Strong, robust, corroborated, confirmed. (Plur. تشددات).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَشَدُّد (tašaddud), borrowed from Arabic تَشَدُّد (tašaddud).

def: s.m. (pl. of tashaddud), Aggravations; rigours, severities, hardships, trials, &c.

ety: inf. n. v of شفو 'to relieve,' &c.
def: s.f. Recovery, restoration; relief; consolation; becoming calm (after anger, &c.), calmness, tranquillity, satisfaction (of mind).
more: (inf. v. of شفي) s. f. 1. Consolation. 2. Becoming calm (after anger), calmness.

def: n. m. A. طاسه A semispherical drum. Rahegā hāl agar mulk kā yehī, to nidān, Gale meṅ tāshā kahāroṅ ke, pālkī meṅ ḍhol . A satire on Retrenchment. Saudā. If such the country's state goes on, at last to this 't will come, On bearers' necks hang kettledrums, the palkī bears the drum. (As a stroke of economy the palki bearers, with the rider, will be made to do the work of musicians also).

ety: inf. n. v of شہد 'to bear witness'
def: s.m. Avowing belief in the unity of God and in the prophetic office of Mohammad (by reciting the formula, 'I bear witness that there is no god but God, and that Mohammad is His servant and apostle'); making a profession of religious sentiments; — seeking martyrdom.
(inf. v. of شـﮩ‍ادت) s. m. 1. Making a profession of religious sentiments. 2. Avowing belief in the unity of the deity and the mission of Muhammad.

ety: inf. n. v of شيع 'to become spread,' &c.
def: s.m. Professing to be of the Mohammadan sect called Shīʻa, or a follower of ʻAlī
subs: s.m. The Shīʻa sect, followers of ʻAlī; heresy (according to Sunnī views); — adj. Heretical.

ety: inf. n. v of شيخ 'to become a shaiḵẖ'
def: s.m. Feigning old age; making a show of dignity; ostentatious pretence to honour or dignity.
more: (inf. v. of شيخ) s. m. Ostentatious pretence to, or display of rank or dignity.

ety: inf. n. v of شأن 'to become a person of importance'
def: s.m. Making a display of state; dignity; ostentation. (The word is not classical.)
more: (inf. v. of شان) s. m. Display ing of state, dignity, ostentation.

def: 1. Heresy. 2. The sect of shīʼaﻌ, followers of Alī. See شيعه.

ety: inf. n. v of شخص; quasi-pass. of next
def: s.m. Individuality, personality; identifying, particularizing; appropriation (cf. the next).
more: (inf. v. of شخص) s. m. Identifying, particularizing, appropriation.

ety: inf. n. v of شكّ 'to be in doubt' (concerning)
def: s.m. Doubting.
more: (inf. v. of شکّ) s. m. Doubting.

ety: inf. n. vi of شکل 'to mark,' &c.
def: s.m. Mutual resemblance.
more: (inf. vi. of شکل) s. m. Mutual resemblance.

ety: rt. Z. tash = S. तक्ष्
def: s.m. An iron instrument for piercing walls.
more: s. m. An iron instrument for piercing walls.

ety: inf. n. v of شنج 'to contract,'
def: s.m. Spasmodic contraction (of a muscle, &c.); cramp; twitching; spasm, convulsion.
more: (inf. v. of شنج) s. m. The cramp, convulsion, spasm.

def: s.f. pl. (of tashrīf), Honours, dignities.

ety: inf. n. v of شرع 'to institute or prescribe (a law),' &c.
def: s.m. Acting in conformity to the ordinances of a prophet (particularly those of Mohammad, called sharʻ); the ordinances of a prophet, &c.
more: (inf. v. of شر) s. m. 1. The ordinances of a prophet, particularly the laws of Muhammad. 2. Acting agreeable to those ordinances.

ety: inf. n. v of شتّ 'to become broken,' &c.
def: s.m. Becoming dissolved or broken up; dispersion, separation. disorder, confusion, distraction.
more: (inf. v. of شتّ) s. m. Dispersion, distraction, separation.

ety: inf. n. ii of شبہہ
def: s.f. Similitude; comparison, simile, metaphor, allegory
subs: (-se), To assimilate (to), liken (to); to compare (with); to illustrate by a simile

def: n. f. شبه made like it. 1. Simile ( upmā ). 2. Allegory. tashbīh denā , v. a. To illustrate by a simile.
more: (inf. ii. of شبه) s. f. A simile, comparison, allegory, metaphor. حرف تشبيه ḥārf-i-tashbīh, Adverb of similitude. تشبيه دينا tashbīh denā, To assimilate, liken, compare.

ety: inf. n. ii of شدّ
def: s.f. Strengthening, confirming, corroborating; doubling a letter by placing the mark or sign (ّ) over it; the mark or sign (ّ), used to indicate that a letter is doubled.
more: n. f. ( Gram .) Doubling a letter; the sign (ّ).

(inf. ii. of شدّ) s. f. 1. Consolidating, corroboration. 2. Putting the orthographical mark tashdīd (ّ) over letters, which denotes that they should be pronounced double. 3. The name of the character itself.

ety: inf. n. ii of شہر 'to make apparent, as evil,' &c.
def: s.f. Proclaiming, publishing; reciting in public; marking a criminal; parading (an offender) as a public example, public exposure (of an offender, who is mounted on an ass — often with his face blackened and turned towards the animal's tail — and paraded through the city)
subs: v.n. To be paraded as a public example (an offender or criminal).

def: n. f. شـﮩر published abroad. ( Mah. law ) Public exposure. The delinquent used to be carried through the town on an ass with his face blackened—formerly the special punishment for perjury.
more: (inf. ii. of شـﮩرت) s. f. Proclaiming, publishing, reciting in publick. 2. Marking a criminal, publick exposure (of a criminal, &c. by carrying him on an ass, &c. through the city). تشـﮩيرهونا tashhīr honā, To be publickly exposed (as a criminal) in the streets.

ety: inf. n. ii of صحف; but formed from the subst. ṣaḥīfa
def: s.f. Making an error in writing; an orthographical mistake; changing the diacritical points so as to alter the pronunciation and meaning of a word.
more: (inf. ii. of صحف) s. f. 1. Making an errour in writing. 2. Writing. 3. Changing the diacritical points so as to alter the pronunciation and meaning of a word.

ety: inf. n. ii of صحّ 'to be healthy, sound, or right,' &c.
def: s.f. Rectification, correction, emendation; verifying; illustrating; verification, attestation
more: n. f. صح was restored to soundness. 1. Correction; emendation; rectification. 2. Verification; attestation. tashīh k . v. n. 1. To amend; correct; rectify. 2. To verify; attest.
(inf. ii. of صحّت) s. f. Rectification, correction, emendation, verifying, illustrating, attestation.

ety: from taṣḥīḥ
def: s.m. Muster, inspection (of troops, &c.: see s.v. dāg̠). s.m. A mark burnt in, a brand, cautery; mark, spot, speck; stain; stigma; blemish; iron-mould; freckle; pock; scar, cicatrix; wound, sore; grief, sorrow; misfortune, calamity; loss, injury, damage; — (adjectively) branded, cauterized, scarred, wounded, &c.
more: s. m. Muster. داغ تصحيحه dāg̠ẖ-i-taṣʼḥīḥa, The office in which the horses taken up for service are marked.
subs: dāg̠ bar bālāʼě dāg̠ = dāg̠-par dāg̠
s.f. Marking out the lines of a road with a spade; a line of road; mark
One misfortune following another, calamity on calamity
adj. Burnt; branded, cauterized; scarred; marked, spotted; streaked, striped; stained; blemished, spoiled
(-meṅ), To set fire (to), to set alight (as a pyre, &c.)
(-meṅ), To mark, to scar; to wound, to grieve
(-meṅ), To vilify, &c. = dāg̠ lagānā (-meṅ), To stain, sully, vilify, defame
(meṅ), To be burnt; to be branded; to be defamed, to get a bad name; to be damaged
v.n. To be cauterized, be scarred, &c.

ety: inf. n. ii of سہل 'to be smooth, easy,' &c.
def: s.f. Making easy, facilitation, smoothing the way (to).
more: (inf. ii. of سہل) s. f. Making easy, facilitating.

ety: inf. n. ii of شخص, but formed from shaḵẖṣ, q.v.
def: s.f. Individuating, distinguishing perfectly; ascertainment, determination, diagnosis, specification; estimate, valuation, appraisement; assessment
more: n. f. شخص it was individuated. 1. Specification; minute description; determination; diagnosis. 2. Appraisement; valuation; estimate. tashkhīs k . v. a. 1. To distinguish; recognize; ascertain (a disease). 2. To appraise; value; assess; adjust. 3. To fix; settle; determine; decide.

(inf. ii. of شخص) s. f. 1. Distinguishing perfectly, ascertainment. (A word much used by physicians, to denote their having ascertained the disorder of a patient, &c.). 2. Valuation. 3. Assessment. تشخيص کرنا tashḵẖīṣ karnā, To ascertain (a disease), assess, value, appraise.
subs: (-kī), To individuate, to distinguish; to ascertain (a disease); to determine, decide, settle; to value, appraise, assess.

def: s.m. corr. of tashnīʻ, q.v. s.f. Speaking ill (of), disparaging, slandering; taunting; taunt, reproach.
more: n. m. شنع Taunt. See طعن

def: s.m. corr. of tashnīʻ, q.v. (used by women; cf. tashnaʻ). s.f. Speaking ill (of), disparaging, slandering; taunting; taunt, reproach.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تِشْنَه (tišna).

ety: inf. n. ii of شنع 'to disgrace,' &c.
def: s.f. Speaking ill (of), disparaging, slandering; taunting; taunt, reproach.
more: (inf. ii. of شنع) s. f. Disparaging, slandering, taunting, reproach.

ety: inf. n. ii of شرف 'to be exalted,' &c.
def: s.f. Honouring, exalting, ennobling; decking or investing with a splendid robe; — (in address) your honour, your worship
more: n. f. A. شرف became exalted. Your honor; your worship. tashrīf lānā ; Fac. tashrīf kā ṭokrā lānā , v. n. To honor with one's presence. Bād muddat ke lāë ho tashrīf, Khush to haiṅ āp ke mizāj sharīf?

(inf. ii. of شرف) s. f. 1. Honouring, exalting. 2. Investing with a splendid robe. تشريف ارزاني فرمانا tashrīf arzānī farmānā, and تشريف فرمانا tashrīf farmānā (mean simply) To go, or to come. تشريف ليجانا tashrīf lejānā, To go, and تشريف لانا tashrīf lānā, To come, i. e. to honour with oneʼs presence (never said of oneʼs self, except by a king).
subs: tashrīf farmānā, v.n. To go; to come
v.n. To grace or honour with one's presence, to come (used in speaking of or to a superior, but never of oneself, except by kings).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَشْرِیف (tašrīf), borrowed from Arabic تَشْرِيف (tašrīf), from شَرَّفَ (šarrafa). First attested in c. 1611 as Middle Hindi تشریف (tśryf /⁠taśrīf⁠/).

def: s.f. pl. (of tashrīf), Honours, dignities.

ety: inf. n. ii of شرح 'to discover, to explain,' &c.
def: s.f. Explaining, expounding; dissecting; explanation, exposition, elucidation; declaration; description; dissection, anatomy; a skeleton or anatomical preparation
more: n. f. 1. Elucidation; illustration; explanation; exposition. 2. Declaration; description; particulars; details. 3. Dissection; anatomy; a skeleton, or anatomical preparation. tashrīh k . v. a. To particularize; enumerate; give details or particulars; illustrate; expound; explain. tashrīh-vār , adv. In detail; with full particulars; minutely; severally. ilm-ut-tashrīh ; H. aṅg-biddyā , The science of Anatomy.
(inf. ii. of شرح) s. f. 1. Explanation, declaration. 2. Anatomy, dissecting a body. تشريح دان tashrīḥ-dān, Anatomist.
subs: (-kī), To explain, expound; to declare, to particularize
adv. In detail, with full particulars, minutely, severally.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تشریح (tašrīh), from Arabic تَشْرِيح (tašrīḥ).

def: adj. Of or pertaining to anatomy, anatomical.

ety: inf. n. ii of شرك 'to be a co-partner,' &c.
def: s.f. Making (one) a co-partner (with); associating one (with); communicating (to).
more: (inf. ii. of شرک) s. Associating with, communicating.

ety: Pehl. tasht; Zend tasta, rt. tash; S. तष्ट, rt. तक्ष्
def: s.m. Cup, bowl, basin, charger, platter, salver (cf. taslā).
more: s. m. A platter, a basin, a charger, a salver. See طشت.

ety: for orig. تشت tasht; Pehl. tasht; Zend tasta, rt. tash = S. तक्ष्
def: s.m. A large basin (of tinned copper, or of brass, &c., used for washing the hands, &c.), an ewer, a cup, bowl
more: n. m. A large basin. tasht az bām h. , v. n. To get wind; become well known. tasht o chaukī , n. f. A commode.
(Pers. تشت) s. m. A large bason, ewer or cup, a bowl.
subs: t̤asht az bām honā or paṛnā
v.n. To be divulged, to become well known, to leak out

ety: t̤asht, q.v.+arī = Prk. अडिआ = S. अ+र+इका
def: s.f. A small bowl or dish, &c.; a saucer.
more: n. f. A saucer; small plate.
wety: Ultimately from Classical Persian تشت (tašt, “saucer, tray”) (whence طشت (tašt) / تشت (tašt))، from Middle Persian tšt' (tašt).

ety: tasht, q.v.+Prk. अडिआ = S. र+ इका
def: s.f. A salver; a small plate or dish (rikābī); a saucer.
more: s. f. A salver, a small plate, a saucer.

ety: tasht, q.v.+Prk. अडिआ = S. र+ इका
def: s.f. A salver; a small plate or dish (rikābī); a saucer.
